word: G147 - αἰσχροκερδῶς - aischrokerdōs - ahee-skhrok-er-doce' - For filthy lucre's sake

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: For filthy lucre's sake
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
from eagerness for base gain (for filthy lucre)
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Adverb from G146; sordidly: - for filthy lucre’s sake.
